source.citation: SYNTHETIC EXECUTABLE TEMPLATE — replace with source-locked data
source.condition: wavelength, incidence, polarization treatment, and scan convention go here once a surface is locked

geometry.brdfToPsdConversion: source-defined Golden Rule / Rayleigh-Rice conversion description goes here

profilePsd.modality: independent topography (profilometry, AFM, interferometry, or equivalent surface map)

units.psd: m^3 (1D) or m^4 (2D azimuthal average) — state which
units._comment: rows are the INDEPENDENTLY measured surface-height profile PSD; never a PSD inferred from the target BRDF

scatterPsd.modality: source-reported BRDF-derived PSDscatter curve for the SAME specimen state

units.psd: m^3 or m^4 — match the profile PSD convention

exclusions.reason: every source-defined instrument-signature, specular-core, or validity-region exclusion goes here (e.g. f < 6 cycles/mm); surviving rows must lie OUTSIDE all ranges

provenance.notes: Schema template only. The two PSD curves MUST come from independent modalities (measured topography vs BRDF-derived) for the same specimen state. Replace every synthetic field and set syntheticTemplate=false only after a fresh paired surface is reserved and source-locked. This comparator is shape-only and carries no substrate-specific evidence.
